name: RouteNote Artist Program
reason: Free music distribution with 85% royalty share (free plan) or 100% (premium plan). Artists earn directly from Spotify, Apple Music, and 50+ platforms. Free to start — no upfront cost.
payoutModel: Revenue share from streams/sales — 85% free, 100% on premium plan

name: UnitedMasters SELECT
reason: Independent music distribution startup backed by Alphabet. SELECT plan gives artists 100% royalty retention. Launched Real-Time Royalties in 2025 — eligible artists can receive daily Spotify/Apple Music payouts.
payoutModel: 100% royalties (SELECT plan, $59.99/yr); daily payouts via Real-Time Royalties for eligible artists

name: Musicbed Artist Program
reason: Premium sync licensing platform for composers. Artists earn 50%+ of all license revenue and retain performance royalties. SyncID system clears YouTube videos and passes ad revenue to artists. Subscription model increased avg annual revenue per artist by 70%.
payoutModel: 50%+ of license fees + performance royalties + YouTube ad revenue passthrough

name: Artlist Composer Program
reason: Music licensing platform for filmmakers/video creators. Composers earn 30% of net subscription revenue based on download share. Exclusive and non-exclusive contracts available. Submissions open periodically — high-quality curated catalog.
payoutModel: 30% of net subscription revenue, proportional to download count; paid annually Dec–Jan

name: Ditto Music Distribution
reason: Music distribution service where artists keep 100% of royalties. Flat annual fee model (from £19/yr) for unlimited releases to 150+ platforms globally. Surpassed 2M registered artists. Publishing admin service also available.
payoutModel: 100% royalty retention; flat annual fee instead of commission

name: Stem Distribution
reason: Artist-first music distribution service. Charges only 5–10% fee, leaving 90–95% of royalties to creators. Known for automated payment splitting for collaborators. Acquired by Concord in March 2025 — still operating independently.
payoutModel: 90–95% royalty share; automated split payments for collaborators

name: Overwolf Creator Program
reason: Platform for in-game apps, overlays, and tools. Paid out record $300M to creators in 2025 (25% increase from 2024, $800M total since launch). Developers earn 70% of revenue via ads, subscriptions, and app monetization. 178,000 creators, 113M MAU.
payoutModel: 70% revenue share via ads (Overwolf Ads SDK), subscriptions, and in-app monetization

name: CurseForge Author Reward Program
reason: Largest mod distribution hub (owned by Overwolf). Mod authors earn 70% of revenue based on monthly downloads. $20.4M paid to 33,686 authors. Premium Mods for games like ARK have generated seven figures in revenue. $50K prize pool contests in 2025.
payoutModel: 70% revenue share based on download volume; redeemable via PayPal or Amazon gift cards
payoutRange: $0.45/1K downloads up to $5–6/day for popular mods

name: Nexus Mods Donation Points
reason: Largest PC modding platform. Mod authors earn Donation Points (1,000 DP = $1) based on mod interactions each month. Payout via PayPal once $100 threshold reached. New ownership (Chosen, June 2025) committed to keeping mods free and maintaining creator pay.
payoutModel: Donation Points system: $0.001 per point, distributed monthly from platform pool; min $100 payout

name: Minecraft Partner Program
reason: Official Bedrock marketplace for maps, skins, texture packs. Creators earn 30–50% of Minecoin sales. $146M generated in Q1 2025 alone, $500M+ paid to creators since launch. Competitive approval (fewer than 100 new partners/year).
payoutModel: 30–50% revenue share of Minecoin purchases after platform store fee

name: Core (Manticore Games) Creator Economy
reason: Free game-creation platform where creators build and publish games. Perks system gives creators 50% of revenue — claimed higher than YouTube, Twitch, TikTok, and Roblox. Monetize via in-app purchases, subscriptions, premium sales. Free to get started.
payoutModel: 50% of in-game revenue via Core Credits → real currency; via Perks program
payoutRange: Varies by game popularity; requires 50 avg daily active users to qualify
